sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67113" key="metecantle/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μετεξ-αντλέω</orth>, <sense id="n67113.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">draw off again</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">θάλασσαν ὀργάνοις</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1240.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Callix.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
